<!-- fixture_expected: fail -->
<!-- fixture_failure: classifier_handoff_packet mode is absent -->

# Commission Signal Board Fixture: bad missing handoff mode

### 1. Commission Intake Receipt

```yaml
commission_id: fixture_bad_missing_handoff_mode
mode: backtest
candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product I
decision_context: Exercise failure when the handoff packet omits mode.
market_or_geography: US
time_window: 2015-2020
evidence_cutoff_at: 2020-12-31
input_status: complete
missing_required_inputs: []
cutoff_rule: backtest classifier handoff must keep mode explicit.
non_goals_preserved:
  - no demand classification
```

### 4. Signal Board Rows

| Row ID | Source family | Subfamily | Surface | Observable | Signal role | Row purpose | Graph role | Graph weight hint | Evidence status | Provenance needed | Surface cutoff status | Cutoff status | Handoff note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SBR-001 | reviews | retailer reviews | PDP reviews | dated experience claims | review_experience | signal_unit | node_candidate | medium | source_backed | review URL and review date supplied | existed_by_cutoff | in_window | Would otherwise be eligible |

### 8. Demand-Classifier Handoff Packet

```yaml
classifier_handoff_packet:
  candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product I
  decision_context: Exercise failure when the handoff packet omits mode.
  cutoff_date: 2020-12-31
  signal_rows_for_handoff:
    - SBR-001
  counterevidence_rows_for_handoff: []
  source_family_gaps: []
  provenance_gaps: []
  cutoff_uncertainties: []
  classifier_mapping_status: classifier_owned
  prohibited_claims:
    - no demand verdict
```
